settings.heading: A calmer, more premium approach to daily pet wellness
settings.subheading: Nuumipet turns everyday dog care into a clear, confidence-building routine with formulas that feel thoughtful, modern, and easy to trust.
settings.callout_title: A homepage that explains the range before it overwhelms
settings.callout_text: Built to feel closer to a premium wellness brand than a crowded supplement store.

settings.summary: Start with a simple, confidence-building product card that explains the outcome in a few clean lines.
Use each card to spotlight a distinct use case while keeping the launch assortment easy to compare.
Keep the summary short, practical, and believable so the homepage feels premium instead of crowded.
Reserve this slot for a hero product, bundle, or the strongest proof-backed offer in the launch set.
Use the fifth slot flexibly for the lighter digital offer or another product once the full launch set is loaded.

settings.eyebrow: All five products, one clear path
settings.heading: The full range, merchandised like a premium edit instead of a crowded grid
settings.intro: Lead with the strongest hero offer, then let the rest of the assortment feel selective, purposeful, and easy to compare.

settings.text: Translate formulation details into simple language shoppers can actually trust.
Use this module to connect expertise, quality control, and the calm premium tone from the brief.
Add a real expert headshot, proof bullets, and one actionable CTA once final assets arrive.

settings.heading: Built with more clarity, more restraint, and a stronger expert point of view
settings.body: This section should make the brand feel human and informed at the same time. The goal is not to overload with claims, but to show that the range has a thoughtful professional backbone.
settings.quote: The best wellness products do not just promise a result. They make the routine easier to understand and easier to trust.
settings.name: Dr. Nuumi Expert

settings.title: Make the why easy to understand
settings.text: Use short, confidence-building copy that explains the role each formula plays in a pet parent's routine.

settings.title: Keep the launch lean and easy to scan
settings.text: Five products is a strength here. The section should help customers understand the full range without adding bloat.

settings.title: Preserve structure while allowing content updates
settings.text: Use settings and blocks for the copy, images, and proof items the client will want to update without code changes.

settings.heading: Make the range feel coherent, useful, and genuinely worth adopting
settings.intro: Use this section to explain why the assortment is intentionally small, what role each formula plays, and why the overall routine feels easier to trust.

settings.title: Clear guarantees near the decision point
settings.text: Use guarantees, shipping promises, or support notes here so the homepage removes friction before the PDP.

settings.title: Science-backed without sounding sterile
settings.text: Summarize lab standards, ingredient quality, or formulation credentials in a calm and readable way.

settings.title: Practical reassurance still converts
settings.text: Shipping speed, responsive support, and easy guarantees often matter as much as the claims themselves.

settings.heading: Reassure the shopper with proof, guarantees, and operational trust that actually feels specific
settings.intro: The design should make these proof points feel grounded and useful, not like generic conversion filler.

settings.question: What makes Nuumipet different from a generic supplement brand?
settings.answer: Nuumipet is designed to feel more intentional and easier to understand, with a tighter product range, clearer storytelling, and a stronger trust-first structure.

settings.question: Will all homepage content stay editable in Shopify Theme Editor?
settings.answer: Yes. The custom Nuumipet sections use editable settings and blocks so the client can update headings, imagery, proof points, and FAQs without touching code.

settings.question: Can this structure expand once more product assets arrive?
settings.answer: Yes. The homepage is designed as a reusable system that can absorb finalized product content, expert assets, and later PDP rollout without rewriting the entire theme.

settings.question: Why show all five products on the homepage?
settings.answer: The brief calls for a lean launch with only five products. Showing them up front helps customers understand the range quickly without forcing a category-heavy browsing flow.

settings.heading: Resolve the final questions without flattening the premium feel of the page
settings.intro: Keep the answers short, useful, and confidence-building so the FAQ feels like support, not clutter.
